title: Rare, formal, and done: ฆ ฌ ฑ ฒ ฬ
pedagogy: Low-class consonants (5/5): rare Indic-loan letters ฆ (kh), ฌ (ch), ฑ ฒ (th), ฬ (l); unit checkpoint with high-vs-low sorting. Obsolete ฅ is excluded.

exercises.title: The rare five
exercises.thaiExample: ฆ ฌ ฑ ฒ ฬ
body: These five low-class letters are rare — most live in words borrowed from Sanskrit and Pali.
You still need to recognize them: ฆ (kh), ฌ (ch), ฑ and ฒ (th), ฬ (l). Their everyday siblings do the daily work.
With these five, you have met all twenty-four low-class consonants — and all forty-four Thai consonants.
